title: Organelle-Target Discovery for Selective Amoebicidal Therapy
abstract: Matched HeLa+Nf vs Nf-only readouts across LDH (24 h), Caspase-3 (48 h), and JC-1 (72 h) to surface organelle-level dependencies that predict selective amoebicidal effect.
contributions: Plate-level assay design across three timepoints with matched co-culture controls
Reproducible analysis pipeline with documented per-plate QC
_comment: TODO: confirm whether this Zenodo deposit corresponds to one of the JEM submissions and consolidate or cross-link if so.

title: Montenegro's Medium: Low-cost Culture Formulation for Naegleria fowleri
abstract: A serum-free, low-cost axenic medium that supports robust Naegleria fowleri growth at a fraction of the per-liter cost of standard formulations, with reproducible passage timing across replicates.
contributions: Three to five times increase in trophozoite yield versus the baseline reference medium
Cost-aware formulation with documented sourcing for each component
Reproducible protocol with QC checkpoints and stable passage cadence
